response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct vocal performances in the video. 2. Song 1 (00:00-02:36): Identified title 'めにしゅきラッシュっしゅ！' from on-screen text. Used search tool to find official lyrics. 3. Song 2 (02:39-04:59): Identified title '百花繚乱' from on-screen text. Used search tool to find official lyrics (matching the 幾田りら song). 4. Constructed the JSON object, including transcripts/lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video of a live performance featuring two songs by Hololive members. The first is 'めにしゅきラッシュっしゅ！' (Menishuki Rashushu!) performed by five VTubers, and the second is '百花繚乱' (Hyakka Ryoran) performed by Oozora Subaru with backup dancers.

scenes.description: Five VTubers perform 'めにしゅきラッシュっしゅ！'. The song is upbeat, and the performers are dancing in a vibrant, colorful stage setting with hearts appearing in the background. Screen text identifies the song title and songwriters.
scenes.song_title: めにしゅきラッシュっしゅ！
